docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SWEENEY MARICEL C. $868.78 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $923.78 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
